last_completed_feature.summary: 13 tasks (T1-T13) across 3 lanes, each independently build-verified, plus one gate-fix micro-round (GF1). LANE A perf-at-scale: T1 per-scan readdir cache kills the O(N^2) sidecar re-detection (AC1.3/1.6/1.7); T2 cooperative non-blocking scan -- 202 ack, async batch-yielding walk (heartbeat proxy <=50ms/stretch @1300), boot-after-listen, mount-loss/prune + overlap-coalescing + incremental-reuse guards preserved (AC1.1/1.2/1.4/1.5, AC2.1/2.2/2.4/2.5); T3 scan-completion client polls /api/scan-status + in-place refresh, window.location.reload removed (AC2.3, BUG-2 generalized); T4 in-memory getCachedDatabase read cache + invalidate-on-save inside saveDatabase, coherent w/ the updateDatabase mutex, O(1) loads (AC3.3; fixed 2 in-place-mutation traps); T5 progress coalescer (<=5s window, >=5:1 batching, shutdown flush, read-your-writes overlay) w/ real-mutations-stay-1:1-atomic vs progress-loss-<=5s both directions (AC4.1/4.2/4.3); T6 paginated /api/videos {items,total,offset,limit} + new pure lib/videoQuery.js (11 require-both-files parity tests) (AC3.1/3.2); T7 client first-page render + IntersectionObserver sentinel + swept all /api/videos callers incl watch.js/player.js full-list (limit clamps to MAX_LIMIT=10000 -> tech-debt #29) (AC3.4). LANE B download-UX: T8 one-shot visibility across on-home/off-home-return/backgrounded-resume via boolean refreshLibraryInPlace + persistent dirty-flag/pendingOneShotJobIds + visibility/pageshow catch-up, loadFreshHomeView dirty-reconcile fixing a real double-bind/listener-leak, reload-never, BUG-2 intact (AC5.1/5.2/5.3/5.4); T10 active-downloads chip conformance (all 4 ACs already held in the v1.24.9 reframe -> 12 lock tests, zero source change) (AC6.1-6.4). LANE C visual-polish: T9 12-token --fs-* type scale tokenizing all 127 font-size decls, 16px input floor preserved (AC7.1/7.2; 3 documented deviations); T11 like->Liked server-side db.liked membership, 1:1-atomic routes, derived-never-persisted liked flag, watch-page button (AC7.3/AC4.2); T12 deterministic avatars (color+glyph) + subscriptions/settings-header routed through the shared resolveAvatarSource, deleting the bespoke first-letter impl (AC7.4/7.5); T13 conservative button polish, style.css only (AC7.6 Dean-on-device). SQLite (A6) DEFERRED with evidence + measurable triggers (tech-debt #28).
last_completed_feature.final_verification: Full suite green on Node 22.23.1 (3593/3593) AND Node 24.14.0 (3593/3593, run by the main session against final post-GF1 code); lint 0 errors / 7 baseline warnings. AC8.1/8.2/8.3 satisfied.
last_completed_feature.gate: Two-reviewer gate PASSED: QA APPROVE (0 CRITICAL/WARNING, 2 SUGGESTIONs -> tech-debt #30 matchesSearch null-guard note) + adversarial APPROVE (0 CRITICAL, 1 WARNING -> tech-debt #29 MAX_LIMIT truncation). Both INDEPENDENTLY verified AC8.4 exercised-not-present across every both-directions guard (AC1.4/1.5, AC1.6/1.7, AC2.5, AC4.2/4.3, AC5.2). GD-1 adopted: T12 hash-letter avatar glyph reverted to first-letter (deterministic color + C5 wiring kept) per unanimous reviewer recommendation, applied as GF1 (one-line source + tests) + adversarial delta-confirm APPROVE. PM acceptance ACCEPT: 37/39 documented ACs PASS w/ cited evidence, AC7.6 DEFERRED (Dean-on-device), AC8.5 PENDING (the release itself).
last_completed_feature.ac_count_note: The state file's Discovery-stage metadata said '48 ACs'; the authoritative exec-plan ## Acceptance Criteria enumerates 39 documented ACs (AC1.1-AC8.5). The PM validated against the authoritative DOCUMENT (correct call). Recorded count: 39.

GD-1 -- avatar glyph is first-letter + deterministic color (hash-letter reverted per unanimous two-reviewer consensus). Adopted-per-reviewer-consensus; Dean may re-open on-device (one-line either way).

AC4.5 (carried over from v1.29) -- navigate-during-download FEEL of the non-blocking one-shot; code-complete + test-verified, not regressed by v1.30 (T8 BUG-2 intact); still awaits Dean's on-device confirmation.
